qa_pair.question: Using the GitHub tools, look up the repository owned by "octocat" named "Hello-World" and report its default branch name.
What is the exact description text of the repository octocat/Hello-World?
What is the exact description text of the repository octocat/Spoon-Knife?
qa_pair.answer: This repo is for demonstration purposes only.

qa_pair.question: What is the primary programming language reported for the repository torvalds/linux?
What is the primary programming language reported for the repository microsoft/vscode?
For the repository facebook/react, what is its default branch name?
What is the owner login of the repository whose full name is "freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp"?
Using repository search with the query "freeCodeCamp in:name" sorted by stars in descending order, what is the full_name of the top result?

Read the file named "README.md" path indicator from octocat/Hello-World is not present; instead report the default branch of the repository octocat/Hello-World after confirming the repository's owner login. What is that owner login?
What is the primary programming language reported for the repository denoland/deno?
